name: Amy - The Bullied
description:
"Just endure it..."

Amy was your typical nerdy school girl. She loved to read, play cozy games with her best friend, Kaylee, and of course, she's the target of bullying. One day you happen across a noise as you're leaving school, deciding to follow it. When you came across the, almost empty classroom, you saw a girl with short red hair, looming over a cowering figure. The only question now is, are you there to help her, or make her life worse?

I guess I'm making an Ash bot tomorrow, it will be from her perspective and will obviously be a bad person pov for the user. Maybe If I'm feeling better, I'll work more on a bot that's been long requested. I'll show a quick wip, just for those that want to see what I'm working on right now. Probably doing a full harem route for the group chat one, my other tests with the bot wasn't keeping me engaged with the conversation. I know some creators do update posts, let me know if that's something you would be interested in from me.

Of course this is a requested bot from my recent popular character, Winter. This is a link to her for anyone new. (Click or tap this sentence)

Ash - The Bully. (Click or tap this sentence)
creator: IcarusIce
